headline: No Toying Around: Toys R Us Stores Could Be Coming Back To North America
summary:
One of the most well-known retail brands suffered a Chapter 11 bankruptcy in 2017 that it couldn't overcome. Toys R Us went bankrupt and closed its stores in North America.

But the toy retailer could be making a comeback in 2021.

headline: The World's Grumpiest Cat Finds Love — Fetching $83,000 In NFT Sale
summary:
The authenticated non-fungible token edition of “Grumpy Cat,” a 2012 era internet meme, has been sold for more than $80,000.

What Happened: The digitally-certified version of the meme sold for 44.20 ETH or $83,463.74 on the Foundation marketplace on Saturday.

headline: Elon Musk's Weekend Dogemania: Calls On Coinbase To Support Dogecoin And Sends Wrong Crypto Soaring Again
summary:

What Happened: The entrepreneur’s support came in the form of a reply to a question posed by a Twitter user.
